schema_comment: Optional manifest for baseline_clean vs candidate_clean compare (--manifest). Paths below are illustrative.

run_config._comment: Use string placeholders if unknown; keep keys stable for tooling.

baseline_clean_profiling_paths: attach op_summary CSV path separately via CLI
candidate_clean_profiling_paths: attach op_summary CSV path separately via CLI

parse_rules._comment_phase_map: Regex on group-by label after aggregation e.g. OP Type name
parse_rules._comment_metrics: Key metrics echoed for humans; aggregates use Task Duration sum today
